what_works: sitemap_index.xml returns 200 and is referenced from robots.txt
Six child sitemaps returned 200: three post sitemaps, page sitemap, category sitemap, and local sitemap
Homepage, /about/, /contact-us/, and /مشاوره-کنکور/ are present in page-sitemap.xml

findings.title: P0 landing coverage is still incomplete
findings.description: Live checks found /مشاوره-آنلاین-کنکور/, /اصفهان/, /تهران/, /بهترین-مشاور-کنکور-اصفهان/, and /بهترین-مشاور-کنکور-تهران/ returning 404, so the sitemap cannot cover key online and local commercial intent.
findings.recommendation: Create clean indexable landing pages for online consultation, Isfahan, Tehran, and best-consultant city queries, then verify they appear in page-sitemap.xml.

findings.title: Commercial short slugs redirect to mismatched articles
findings.description: /ثبت-نام/, /برنامه-ریزی-کنکور/, and /انتخاب-رشته/ return 301 to unrelated article-style pages instead of commercial landings.
findings.recommendation: Replace these redirects with intent-matched landing pages or redirect them to the closest true commercial service pages.

findings.title: /مشاوره-کنکور/ is present but not a clean hub
findings.description: The page returns 200 and is in page-sitemap.xml, but the live probe found 17 H1 elements including article titles.
findings.recommendation: Rebuild /مشاوره-کنکور/ as a commercial hub with one H1, clear offer, proof, FAQs, CTA, and links to child service pages.

findings.title: local-sitemap.xml does not represent city pages
findings.description: local-sitemap.xml returns 200 but only points to locations.kml, while clean Isfahan and Tehran landing pages are missing.
findings.recommendation: Use city pages in the normal page sitemap and keep KML/schema as supporting local signals.
